---
title: "Complex Numbers -- Lecture Notes"
date: last-modified
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
format:
  typst:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
---

```{=typst}
#import "../../shared/styles/shared.typ": *
#import "../../shared/styles/lecture.typ": *
#setup-lecture("complex", "Complex Numbers", "Gymnasium -- Mathematics")
#let p = get-palette("complex")
```

<!-- Complex Numbers Lecture Notes
     See shared/templates/lecture-template.qmd for environment usage. -->

# Introduction

## Overview

Content goes here.

::: {.exercise}
First exercise.

::: {.solution}
First solution.
:::
:::

::: {.solutions-list}
:::
